User.title: User Profile
User.description: The educational dashboard profile of a Moroccan student registered in the application.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication user ID.

level.description: Selected academic year (1ere, 2eme, or 3eme Année Collégiale).

currentStreak.description: Number of consecutive daily practice days.

totalCorrect.description: Total number of correctly answered grammar, lexicon, and comprehension exercises.

unlockedBadges.description: List of unlocked reward and honor badges.

solvedCount.description: Map tracking number of exercises solved for each specific topic ID.

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user profiles holding educational state, level preferences, and study analytics.
